## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on various initiatives related to promoting and delivering AI-powered content creation services.](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel is seeing good traction with his LinkedIn posts and generating leads/signups for the workshop](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Need to figure out a streamlined process for adapting the generated content to each client's brand voice/products](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Exploring integration with SEMrush and other data providers to enhance SEO capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [Planning another workshop or webinar, potentially focused on the SEO use case](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Discussing product enhancements like version control for workspace variables, image generation, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
  - [Exploring creating a joint customer case study/landing page to showcase the offering](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=2189.0)

## Topics

### LinkedIn Promotion and Lead Generation

  - [Marcel's recent LinkedIn posts have gotten huge engagement (400-500 comments)](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Using Phantombuster to automatically connect with engaged users and promote the workshop](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [This has generated 5 new workshop signups so far](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Developing a solid playbook for leveraging LinkedIn to drive distribution](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)

### Adapting Content to Client Brands

  - [Current workflow generates brand-neutral output, need to adapt it to each client's brand voice/products](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Exploring having a separate "rewrite" step using GPT to insert client branding](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Or having the outline suggest places to insert client links/mentions](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)

### SEMrush and Data Provider Integrations

  - [Discussing integrating with SEMrush API to pull keyword/ranking data into workflows](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [Also exploring integrations with SimilarWeb, Ahrefs and other data providers](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [This would enable automating content briefs, tracking rankings over time, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)

### Next Workshop/Webinar Planning

  - [Discussing timing for next workshop, potentially late June/July](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
  - [Or doing a shorter webinar focused on the SEO use case to drive more signups](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Could use existing webinar recording as an evergreen lead magnet](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)

### Product Enhancements

  - [Version control for workspace variables to easier iterate on prompts](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
  - [Better image generation capabilities (stock, Midjourney, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [Permissioning and workspace management for enterprise](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)

### Joint Customer Case Study

  - [Interest from investors/partners in a customer case study page](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=2139.0)
  - [Could showcase the DeepGram use case, highlight the process](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=2169.0)
  - [Serve as initial joint landing/partner page, evolve over time](https://fathom.video/share/5cM1eptQTSrwnj677Y75C35Kxu6G5zkn?tab=summary&timestamp=2189.0)
